summary: The primary concern for managing this case revolves around addressing the acute infection first via apexification in tooth 12 because of its developmental stage; subsequently, perform endodontic treatment on tooth 11 which already has completed roots but shares the bacterial load necessitating immediate intervention. \boxed{\text{Apexification of } T12 + Endodontics of }T11\.

Answer choice: A
